name: Garden Layered Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, toss the broccoli florets, cauliflower florets, mushrooms, peas, radishes, carrots, and pea mixture with green onions.
2. Whisk together olive oil, red wine vinegar, sugar, chives, pepper, Dijon mustard, salt, and garlic in a small bowl.
3. Pour the dressing over the vegetables and toss to combine.
4. In a serving dish or large bowl, layer half of the greens on the bottom.
5. Add half of the vegetable mixture on top of the greens.
6. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
7. Cover and refrigerate for at least 6 hours, or overnight.
